name: Rapalog Pharmacology (RAP PAC) Study
summary: ClinicalTrials.gov recruiting phase 1 non-randomized RAP PAC study of weekly sirolimus or everolimus in adults aged 55 to 89, focused on dose-limiting toxicities, pharmacokinetics, mTOR signaling, omics, glucose tolerance, insulin sensitivity, and safety with no posted results in the June 11, 2026 API view.
